treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Left internal mammary artery graft to left anterior descending; reverse saphenous vein graft to the obtuse marginal branch, diagonal branch, and posterior descending artery.
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient had incisional pain managed with oxycodone. Incisions healing well, no erythema or drainage.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient experienced episode of resting chest discomfort and was referred for cardiac catheterization.
Coronary artery bypass grafting x4 performed.

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and oriented x3, ambulating with steady gait, healing well post-surgery.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up appointment with the surgeon to discuss driving and further care.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Expected to heal well following the standard post-operative instructions.
